title: Register 9 preset attributes via DeferredRegister to BuiltInRegistries.ATTRIBUTE

reference_files.reason: System 1: Attribute system - preset attribute definitions, base=0 rule, DeferredRegister requirement
M1 milestone scope - attribute registration requirements

acceptance_criteria: ModularShootAttributes class exists with 9 static DeferredHolder<Attribute, Attribute> constants: HIT_DAMAGE, FIRE_RATE, RANGE, ACCURACY_YAW, ACCURACY_PITCH, ENTITY_PENETRATION, BULLET_SPEED, BULLET_SIZE, BLOCK_PENETRATION
All 9 attributes registered via DeferredRegister to BuiltInRegistries.ATTRIBUTE with namespace 'modularshoot'
All 9 attributes have base value 0 (sentinel value, actual defaults stored in attribute_meta)
ATTRIBUTES DeferredRegister is registered on the mod event bus in ModularShoot constructor

Attribute IDs match: modularshoot:hit_damage, modularshoot:fire_rate, modularshoot:range, modularshoot:accuracy_yaw, modularshoot:accuracy_pitch, modularshoot:entity_penetration, modularshoot:bullet_speed, modularshoot:bullet_size, modularshoot:block_penetration
